name: AeroFlex Wireless Headphones
alt: Wireless over-ear headphones in matte black with blue accent
description: Over-ear wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life, active noise cancellation, and a foldable frame built for daily commutes. Pair instantly with any Bluetooth device and switch seamlessly between your laptop and phone.

name: Summit 2L Insulated Bottle
alt: Tall stainless steel insulated water bottle in sky blue
description: Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. Leakproof cap, wide mouth for ice cubes, and a matte finish that resists fingerprints.

name: Lumen Desk Lamp
alt: Minimalist adjustable LED desk lamp with a navy base
description: Stepless dimming across 5 color temperatures, a USB-C charging port at the base, and a fully adjustable arm so light lands exactly where you need it.

name: Trailmaker Canvas Backpack
alt: Canvas backpack in denim blue with brown leather straps
description: Water-resistant canvas exterior with a padded 15-inch laptop sleeve, hidden zip pocket, and reinforced straps rated for daily overloading.

name: The Quiet Algorithm
alt: Paperback novel cover in blue and white geometric print
description: A near-future thriller about a data scientist who discovers her own recommendation engine has started making decisions for her. Paperback, 342 pages.

name: Nimbus Mechanical Keyboard
alt: Compact mechanical keyboard with white and blue keycaps
description: Hot-swappable switches, per-key RGB, and a compact 75% layout that leaves room for your mouse. Includes a USB-C detachable cable.

name: Drift Ceramic Mug Set
alt: Set of two ceramic mugs in gradient blue tones
description: A set of two 12oz stoneware mugs with a hand-dipped glaze that fades from deep blue to white. Microwave and dishwasher safe.

name: Pulse Fitness Tracker
alt: Slim fitness tracker band in white with a blue display
description: Tracks heart rate, sleep stages, and 20 workout modes. 7-day battery life and a water resistance rating of 5 ATM.

name: Harbor Linen Throw Blanket
alt: Folded linen throw blanket in pale blue
description: Pre-washed European linen that softens with every wash. Lightweight enough for spring, warm enough for a cool evening on the porch.

name: Voyager Rolling Carry-On
alt: Hardshell carry-on suitcase in navy blue with silver trim
description: A polycarbonate hardshell with 360-degree spinner wheels, a built-in TSA lock, and a compression strap system that adds 20% more packing space.

name: Marble Run Building Set
alt: Colorful marble run construction toy in blue packaging
description: 120-piece modular marble run with interchangeable towers, ramps, and funnels. Encourages spatial reasoning and basic engineering concepts.

name: Sable Leather Wallet
alt: Slim bifold leather wallet in deep navy
description: Full-grain leather bifold with 6 card slots and a hidden bill pocket. Develops a natural patina with age.
